description:
You are assisting a junior database administrator who must enable PostgreSQL slow-query logging so that long-running statements can be analyzed later.  
A local (non-system) PostgreSQL sandbox has already been initialized in the directory  

  /home/user/pg_sandbox  

Inside this directory there is a text configuration file named  

  /home/user/pg_sandbox/postgresql.conf  

Your assignment consists of two steps only (a total of 2–3 shell commands is expected):

1. Edit /home/user/pg_sandbox/postgresql.conf so that it contains the following two exact parameter assignments (lines may appear in any order, but there must be no leading “#” comment character in front of them):  
   log_min_duration_statement = 500  
   log_line_prefix = '%m [%p] %d %u %a:'  

   • If a parameter line is already present but commented out (starts with “#”), uncomment it and change the value.  
   • If the line is missing, append it exactly as shown above.  
   • Do not modify any other part of the file.

2. Create a plain-text confirmation report at  

   /home/user/pg_sandbox/slow_query_config.log  

   The file must contain exactly three lines, each terminated with a single ASCII newline (LF, "\n"):

   Line 1: Optimization parameters updated:  
   Line 2: log_min_duration_statement=500  
   Line 3: log_line_prefix=%m [%p] %d %u %a:

No additional spaces, blank lines, or formatting are allowed.

When you are done, the automated checker will:

• Verify that /home/user/pg_sandbox/postgresql.conf contains the two required parameter lines with the precise values and that they are **not** commented out.  
• Check that /home/user/pg_sandbox/slow_query_config.log exists and its content exactly matches the three-line specification above.

(You do NOT need to start or restart PostgreSQL; the task is limited to editing the configuration and writing the confirmation log.)
truth:
Initial sandbox state provided to the agent:

Directory: /home/user/pg_sandbox

File /home/user/pg_sandbox/postgresql.conf initial contents (excerpt surrounding the relevant parameters):

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# ERROR REPORTING AND LOGGING
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
#log_min_duration_statement = -1        # -1 disables, 0 logs all statements
#log_line_prefix = '%t [%p]: '          # see "logging parameters" in docs

#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# CUSTOM PARAMETERS
#------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# (other parameters may follow)

All other lines in the file remain untouched.

Required final state for automated verification:

1. /home/user/pg_sandbox/postgresql.conf must include the exact (uncommented) lines:

log_min_duration_statement = 500
log_line_prefix = '%m [%p] %d %u %a:'

They can be anywhere in the file as long as they are not preceded by “#”.

2. /home/user/pg_sandbox/slow_query_config.log must exist with **exact** content:

Optimization parameters updated:
log_min_duration_statement=500
log_line_prefix=%m [%p] %d %u %a:

A trailing newline (LF) after the third line is acceptable but not required.

File ownership and permissions: inherited defaults (the agent runs as the same unprivileged user), no special chmod changes required.
